config.title: Ustawienia tego komputera #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'messagebox #include "50122"
'underConstruction #include "50200"
#include "50222" #include "50516"
dim bFastGraphics dim pSys
function fopen() set pSys=doc_.system
bFastGraphics=true
dim strFastGrph strFastGrph=pSys.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Support", "FastGraphics")
if (strFastGrph="" or strFastGrph="0") then bFastGraphics=false end if
ShowOfficeOptions fopen=true end function
function fclose() fclose=true end function
function fsave() dim strWrite: strWrite="0" if (bFastGraphics) then strWrite="1" end if
pSys.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Support", "FastGraphics")=strWrite fsave=true end function
function fback() fback=std_fback() end function
function fok() fsave page_.goback end function
function fcancel() page_.goback end function
'--------------------------------------------------------------------- 'wymiana z kontrolkami '--------------------------------------------------------------------- function c4_ongetdata(byref oCtrl): c4_ongetdata=true if (bFastGraphics) then oCtrl.value="1" else oCtrl.value="0" end if end function
function c4_ondataentered(byref oCtrl, byval newValue) if (newValue="1") then bFastGraphics=true else bFastGraphics=false end if c4_ondataentered=true end function
sub ShowSettingsPage(settings_page,registry_key,title)
dim pNewHli set pNewHli=doc_.createhlistr("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=" + CStr(settings_page))
dim pPage:set pPage=doc_.getpagehli(pNewHli) if pPage is nothing then exit sub end if
if registry_key <> "" then pPage.setup CStr(title) , CStr(registry_key) end if
pPage.domodalauto set pPage=nothing end sub
function bar_code_settings ShowSettingsPage PAGE_FORM_COMM_PORT_SETTINGS,"HKLM_BARCODE_SETTINGS","Parametry komunikacji dla czytnika kodów kreskowych" end function
function collector_settings 'najpierw zapytamy czy chcemy ustawić port czy eksportować produkty dim nQuestionResult nQuestionResult = MessageBoxCustom("Korzystając z tej opcji możesz skonfigurować port do ktorego podlączony jest kolektor lub eksportować do niego wybrane produkty. Co chcesz zrobić?", "Kolektor", vbYesNo, vbQuestion, "Ustawienia portu;Eksport produktów") if nQuestionResult = vbYes then
ShowSettingsPage PAGE_FORM_COMM_PORT_SETTINGS,"HKLM_KOLEKTOR_SETTINGS","Parametry komunikacji dla kolektora danych"
elseif nQuestionResult = vbNo then
dim dialog_produkt_filtr : set dialog_produkt_filtr = doc_.getpagehli("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_WIZARD_PAGE varDestPage=DIALOG_PRODUKT_FILTR") dim nRes:nRes = dialog_produkt_filtr.domodalauto() if nRes <> 0 then 'wybierzemy sobie najpierw magazyn dim mag_id:mag_id = fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN ,"","","","","") if mag_id > 0 then dim pCursor:set pCursor = dialog_produkt_filtr.cursor_for_send_to_collector(mag_id) if pCursor is nothing then exit function end if
dim pCollectorUtil:set pCollectorUtil = doc_.getmodule(60205) pCollectorUtil.send_products_to_collector pCursor
end if
end if
end if end function
function printer_settings ShowSettingsPage PAGE_FORM_PRINTER_SETTINGS,"","" end function
function kasa_settings ShowSettingsPage PAGE_FORM_KASA_FISK_SETTINGS,"","" end function
function getOfficeConnectorInstallPath() dim strOCRegPath strOCRegPath=Trim(pSys.registry(hKey_LocalMachine,"SOFTWARE\NAVO\NAVO2002\Setup", "InstallationRoot")) if not Right(strOCRegPath,1)="\" then strOCRegPath=strOCRegPath+"\" getOfficeConnectorInstallPath=strOCRegPath+"System\navooffc.dll" end function
function fOCon() doc_.system.registerdll getOfficeConnectorInstallPath()
if (not isOfficeConnectorInstalled()) then view_message 6259, 0 else view_message 6260, 0 end if end function
'----------------------------------------------------------------- ' Poniewaz Outlook ma błąd i sam nie woła event'a OnDisconnection ' dla AddIn'a przy wyjsciu z aplikacji my recznie odinstalujemy ' pozycje menu '----------------------------------------------------------------- function Unregister_Outlook_AddIn(): Unregister_Outlook_AddIn = false on error resume next
dim pAddIn: set pAddIn = nothing set pAddIn = CreateObject("NavoOffC.Extensions")
if (pAddIn is nothing) then exit function end if
pAddIn.UnregisterOutlook doc_
set pAddIn = nothing Unregister_Outlook_AddIn = (err.Number=0)
on error goto 0
ShowOfficeOptions end function
function fOCoff() if (Unregister_Outlook_AddIn()) then page_.updateview end if
doc_.system.unregisterdll getOfficeConnectorInstallPath()
if (isOfficeConnectorInstalled()) then view_message 6258, 0 else view_message 6257, 0 end if
ShowOfficeOptions end function
function isOfficeConnectorInstalled() dim pOfficeConnector: set pOfficeConnector = nothing
on error resume next set pOfficeConnector = CreateObject("NavoOffC.Extensions") on error goto 0
isOfficeConnectorInstalled = (not pOfficeConnector is nothing) end function
function ShowOfficeOptions() if (isOfficeConnectorInstalled()) then ' page_.ctrl(20).hide = true ' page_.ctrl(21).hide = false else ' page_.ctrl(20).hide = false ' page_.ctrl(21).hide = true end if end function
function fRemoveCache() doc_.purgelocalcache end function

page.body:
XFOPTSECBEG(7,Konfiguracja urządzeń zewnętrznych,2)
#macro TR_CONFIG_BUTTON(_function_,_title_) \
\ \ _title_ \ \
TR_CONFIG_BUTTON(bar_code_settings,Czytnik kodów kreskowych) TR_CONFIG_BUTTON(printer_settings,Drukarka fiskalna) TR_CONFIG_BUTTON(collector_settings,Kolektor) TR_CONFIG_BUTTON(kasa_settings,Kasa fiskalna)
XFSECEND
#ifdef NEXTVERSION XFOPTSECBEG(8,NAVO Office Expander,2)
Włącz
Wyłącz
XFSECEND
XFOPTSECBEG(9,Tymczasowe pliki aplikacji,2) TR_CONFIG_BUTTON(fRemoveCache,Usuń całą zawartość offline)
XFSECEND #endif
XFDIALOGBUTTONS
